title: docs: add polly review trigger convention
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Summoning Polly
gist.blurb: Added a quick note to our agent docs on how to summon Polly for a PR review. Just whisper her name in a comment!
gist.summary: Updated AGENTS.md to document the convention for triggering automated PR reviews by mentioning 'polly' in a comment.
gist.impact: Contributors now have clear instructions on how to request an AI review on their pull requests.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee being summoned by a comment. A retro terminal with a chat bubble saying 'polly', and Polly the bee flying out or looking excited with a magnifying glass (reviewing).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a retro computer terminal displaying a chat bubble with the word 'polly' in pixel font. The cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses hovers nearby, holding a small magnifying glass ready to review code. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a retro computer terminal displaying a chat bubble with the word 'polly' in pixel font. The cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses hovers nearby, holding a small magnifying glass ready to review code. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
